# The Found Sock Laundromat

> Self-service laundromat in Brighton, Massachusetts. Brand-new card-operated machines, no quarters, free Wi-Fi, and a mobile app that lets customers start machines from their phone.

## Quick facts

- **Address:** 76 Washington Street, Brighton, MA 02135
- **Hours:** 6 AM to 11 PM, every day including holidays
- **Payment:** Credit card, Apple Pay, Google Pay, or loyalty card (loadable with cash or credit at our in-store touchscreen kiosk)
- **Machines:** 20 lb, 30 lb, 35 lb, and 45 lb front-load washers; 30 lb dryers
- **Prices:** Washers $6.00–$7.75 depending on size; dryers $0.50 per 4-minute interval
- **Loyalty card:** $1.50 one-time fee, $1 minimum load, never expires, earns 10% cashback
- **Mobile app:** Free CCI/FasCard app on iOS and Android — start machines from your phone, see real-time availability, get push notifications when cycles finish
